rationale: All ACs met: derived-view fields rendered, freshness badge with connected/stale/disconnected states, duplicate-worker rows grouped per project root with banner, non-authoritative label present, .gql query added, and Playwright spec covers all behaviors. Execution evidence reports task_succeeded.

findings.summary: Loader filters reportedWorkers client-side by project path; if /api/projects fails the filter falls through to show all workers (acceptable fallback, not an AC issue).
Both inline gql template (in +layout.ts) and worker.gql duplicate the ReportedWorkersByProject definition; harmless but slight redundancy.
